name: User can create a subject and topic in Settings
description: In Settings → Subjects tab, user creates a new subject with a name and color, then adds a topic to that subject.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in with valid credentials
Click the Settings link in the sidebar
Click the Subjects tab in the settings page
Click the button to add a new subject and enter a subject name
Verify the newly created subject appears in the subjects list with its name visible
